name: M&A Saga
description: A major merger or acquisition story progressing through rumor, formal offer, regulatory review, negotiation, and eventual close or collapse.

phases.name: Rumor
phases.description: Market rumors, media reports of exploratory talks, unusual trading activity. Neither party confirms.

phases.name: Formal Offer
phases.description: Official announcement of offer, terms disclosed, valuation debated. Market reacts to premium/discount.

phases.name: Regulatory Review
phases.description: Competition commission, SEBI, or sector-specific regulators review the deal. Conditions may be imposed.

phases.name: Counter-Bids / Negotiation
phases.description: Competing offers emerge, terms renegotiated, or deal structure modified. Shareholder activism possible.

phases.name: Close or Collapse
phases.description: Deal closes successfully, or falls apart due to regulatory block, financing failure, or mutual withdrawal.
